reason: Primary MCP server product plan and safety contracts.
Phase 1 path editing reliability roadmap and boundaries.
Backend guideline index and pre-development checklist.
Module organization for core path parsing and tool wiring.
Error semantics for invalid path data and guarded edit operations.
Backend test and code quality expectations for parser/query/edit changes.
Write operations must log summaries only after successful mutation.
Filesystem persistence, snapshot-before-write, and no-database boundaries.
Durable path editing and arc query contracts to extend safely.
Parser changes should reuse existing path-data helpers rather than parallel implementations.
